releasedToday.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
releasedToday.highlight: 流行巨星未完成的梦幻篇章
releasedToday.summary: Lil Nas X 以未完成形态发布这张充满自省与实验性的专辑，融合流行与另类R&B，展现脆弱与野心并存的独特魅力。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Lil Nas X releases this unfinished, introspective and experimental album blending pop and alternative R&B, showcasing a unique mix of vulnerability and ambition.

releasedToday.title: KL7
releasedToday.summary: Kendrick Lamar 新作《KL7》延续其深邃叙事风格，以编号为线索探讨身份与权力，预料将引发全球乐迷热议。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Kendrick Lamar's new album 'KL7' continues his deep narrative style, using numbers as clues to explore identity and power, set to spark global discussion.

releasedToday.title: Euphoria
releasedToday.highlight: 德国电子大师的极乐幻境
releasedToday.summary: Schiller 新专辑《Euphoria》以宏大电子音景营造极致愉悦感，适合沉浸式聆听，延续其标志性的治愈系风格。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Schiller's 'Euphoria' creates ultimate bliss with grand electronic soundscapes, perfect for immersive listening, continuing his signature healing style.

releasedToday.title: Warehouse 2026: 7.16.2025 Allianz Amphitheater At Riverfront, Richmond, VA
releasedToday.highlight: Dave Matthews 乐队现场新章
releasedToday.highlightEn: Dave Matthews Band's live new chapter
releasedToday.summary: Dave Matthews Band 在里士满的现场录音，捕捉乐队2026年巡演的即兴能量与经典曲目，乐迷必收。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Live recording from Dave Matthews Band's Richmond show, capturing the improvisational energy and classic tracks from their 2026 tour, a must-have for fans.

releasedToday.title: Living Free (Live Manchester '75)
releasedToday.highlight: 民谣传奇的1975年现场重现
releasedToday.summary: Don McLean 1975年曼彻斯特现场录音首次释出，经典曲目与即兴演绎交织，民谣爱好者不可错过的历史档案。
releasedToday.summaryEn: First release of Don McLean's 1975 Manchester live recording, weaving classic songs with improvisation, a historical archive not to be missed by folk lovers.

releasedToday.title: The Power Station
releasedToday.summary: The Power Station 同名专辑再版或新作引发怀旧热潮，融合摇滚与放克，重现80年代华丽声响。
releasedToday.summaryEn: The Power Station's self-titled album reissue or new work sparks nostalgia, blending rock and funk, reviving the glamorous sound of the 80s.

releasedToday.title: RAVEPOP
releasedToday.artist: r u s s e l b u c k
releasedToday.summary: r u s s e l b u c k 的《RAVEPOP》以跳跃节拍与扭曲音色构建怪诞电子世界，适合寻求新鲜听觉刺激的听众。
releasedToday.summaryEn: r u s s e l b u c k's 'RAVEPOP' builds a bizarre electronic world with bouncing beats and distorted tones, perfect for listeners seeking fresh sonic刺激.

releasedToday.title: One Moment in Time: Live in the USA
releasedToday.highlight: 吉他英雄的美国现场印记
releasedToday.summary: Robin Trower 美国巡演现场专辑，以灵魂蓝调和精湛吉他独奏征服耳膜，硬摇滚乐迷的盛宴。
releasedToday.summaryEn: Robin Trower's US tour live album conquers ears with soulful blues and masterful guitar solos, a feast for hard rock fans.
